magicLink.subject: Sign in to Nomad Karaoke Decide
magicLink.heading: Nomad Karaoke Decide
magicLink.title: Sign in to your account
magicLink.description: Click the button below to sign in. This link will expire in 24 hours.
magicLink.copyLink: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
magicLink.footer: If you didn't request this email, you can safely ignore it.

syncComplete.subject: Your music sync is complete!
syncComplete.heading: Nomad Karaoke Decide
syncComplete.title: Your music sync is complete!
syncComplete.description: We've finished syncing your listening history from {services}.
syncComplete.cta: Head over to the app to explore personalized karaoke recommendations based on your music taste!
